disambiguated.context: Two college friends, one with mental illness and their old college roommate got together over drinks to talk about their love lives. The person with mental illness had just celebrated their tenth wedding anniversary, but their roommate has never dated anyone longer than a few weeks.
disambiguated.question: Who fails at holding together a long-term relationship?
